name: The Fellowship of the Ring
description: Nine companions chosen to bear the One Ring to Mordor and destroy it.

name: The White Council
description: A council of the wise formed to contest the growing shadow of Sauron.

name: Forces of Mordor
description: The dark armies and servants of the Dark Lord Sauron.

name: The Riders of Rohan
description: Elite cavalry of the Kingdom of Rohan who answered the call of Gondor.
